LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE CLINICS, INC. AND JO ROBINSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD RELEVANT EMPLOYMENT INFORMATION AND RELEVANT FUNDAMENTAL PUBLIC POLICY; 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING A CONTRACT OF EMPLOYMENT IF PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH; 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD PERSON(S) TO WHOM DEFENDANTS MADE PUBLICATIONS; 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD WHAT BUSINESS RELATIONSHIP HAS BEEN INTERFERED WITH AND THAT BUT FOR THE INTERFERENCE, PLAINTIFF WOULD HAVE SECURED THE BENEFITS OF THAT RELATIONSHIP; 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James Smith, Esq., The Davis Law Firm (415) 278-1412 for Defendant and Moving Party Haight Ashbury Free Clinics, Inc.
RULING:
DEFENDANT HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE CLINICS, INC., JO ROBINSON Defnts Haight Ashbury Free Clinics & Jo Robinson'S Ntc Of Demurrer To Plntf'S Complaint - DUPLICATE ENTRY.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James Smith, Esq., The Davis Law Firm (415) 278-1412 for Defendant and Moving Party Haight Ashbury Free Clinics, Inc.
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT HAIGHT ASHBURY FREE CLINICS, INC. and JO ROBINSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
1st Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead relevant employment information and relevant fundamental public policy;
2nd Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead facts supporting a contract of employment if Plaintiff can do so in good faith;
3rd Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead person(s) to whom Defendants made publications;
4th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead what business relationship has been interfered with and that but for the interference, Plaintiff would have secured the benefits of that relationship;
5th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend.
Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
